items.description: Response from Delta Dental From:	no-reply@messaging.delta.org To:	1@wporta.com Cc:	 Sent:	3/16/2026 2:02:40 PM     Dear William Porta,  Thanks for contacting Delta Dental. Your questions and concerns are very important to us.  Our records indicate the payment of $245.00 will be mailed to the dental provider on 03/18/2026. The plan has an assignment of benefits clause and the claim was submitted indicating the payment is to be paid to the dental provider. Please contact the dental office for a refund.  Thank you, Christine L. Customer Service  Questions? Call Customer Service 800-932-0783 Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM ET #ePHI
